description: Unofficial browser-session CLI for Midjourney's web app API.

tools.name: explore_list
tools.description: Fetch an explore feed. Optional: feed, page, query-locale. Returns the ExploreResponse.

params.name: feed
params.description: Explore feed name observed from the web app

tools.name: explore_style_likes
tools.description: Fetch style-like metadata for explore cards. Optional: query-locale. Returns the ExploreStylesLikesResponse.

tools.name: folders_list
tools.description: List folders in the authenticated account. Returns the FoldersResponse.

tools.name: generations_list
tools.description: List recent jobs/images for the authenticated Midjourney user. Optional: user-id, page-size (default: 25), cursor. Returns the JobsResponse.

params.name: user-id
params.description: Midjourney web user id observed from the browser request

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor returned by the web app

tools.name: generations_updates
tools.description: Poll recent job updates for the authenticated user. Optional: user-id, page-size (default: 25), checkpoint. Returns the JobsResponse.

params.name: user-id
params.description: Midjourney web user id observed from the browser request

params.name: checkpoint
params.description: Checkpoint token from a previous update response

tools.name: moodboards_list
tools.description: List moodboards for the authenticated account. Returns the MoodboardsResponse.

tools.name: profiles_following
tools.description: List following metadata for the logged-in user. Returns the FollowingResponse.

tools.name: profiles_personalized
tools.description: List personalized profile metadata. Returns the PersonalizedProfilesResponse.

tools.name: queue_status
tools.description: Show queued/running Midjourney work for the logged-in account. Returns the QueueStatus.

tools.name: rankings_contests_count
tools.description: Fetch contest ranking counts. Returns the ContestsRankingCountResponse.

tools.name: rankings_model_ratings
tools.description: Fetch model rating tasks visible to the account. Returns the ModelRatingsResponse.

tools.name: storage_list
tools.description: List storage metadata exposed by the web app. Returns the StorageResponse.
